title: Beastial
body:
Who wants boring old villagers? Not me! **Beastial** makes some mobs into some sort of beast(hence the name).

## This pack requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)+[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) to work properly.

# Features include:
- New Villager model and textures. 8 common variants, 1 rare ginger variant, and 1 ultra-rare albino variant(+hornless versions of all of them!)
- New Zombie Villager model and textures. 3 variants (+hornless versions!)
- New Wandering Trader model and textures. 2 variants (+hornless- you get the idea)
- New Iron Golem model and textures
- New Copper Golem model and textures
- New Evoker model and textures. 2 variants
- New Evoker Fangs model and textures
- New Illusioner model and textures
- New Pillager model and textures. 3 variants
- New Vindicator model and textures. 3 variants
- New Witch model and textures
- New Ravager model and texture
- 8 named (Zombie) Villager variants
- 1 named Wandering Trader variant
- 1 named Evoker variant
- 2 named Pillager variants
- 2 named Vindicator variants
- 1 named Witch variant
- Changed Totem of Undying, Spawn Eggs, and 'Humble' painting to match all the new models

## Important notes
- All Baby Villagers spawn without horns. Unfortunately this means their variant may change when they grow up
- I am unable to change the Ominous Banner texture
  
<details>
<summary>Named Variants</summary>

### (Zombie) Villager
- Jersey Devil
- Gompers
- Toriel
- Asriel
- Reingoat
- Rudolph
- Elf
- Snowgoat
### Wandering Trader
- Santa
### Evoker
- Festive
### Pillager
- America/Murica
- Festive
### Vindicator
- America/Murica
- Festive
### Witch
- Festive
</details>

### Custom Zombie Villager armor model courtesy of [sanguardmc](https://modrinth.com/user/sanguardmc)'s pack [Expanded Entity Armor Model](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/expanded-entity-armor-model) (I've edited it slightly) ty! <3
